final:
module RefModule (
    input wire clk,
    input wire [4:0] temperature,
    output reg [1:0] status
);
  wire _tap_clk = clk & {1{1'b1}};

    always @(posedge clk) begin
        if (temperature <= 5'd10) begin
            status <= 2'b00; // Low
        end else if (temperature <= 5'd20) begin
            status <= 2'b01; // Normal
        end else begin
            status <= 2'b10; // High
        end
    end
endmodule
